mapper.select: SELECT approver_user_id FROM attendance_user_approvers WHERE applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} ORDER BY approver_user_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_user_approvers (applicant_user_id, approver_user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicantUserId}, #{approverUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT approver_user_id FROM attendance_department_approvers WHERE department_name = #{departmentName} ORDER BY approver_user_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_department_approvers SET department_name = #{newDepartmentName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE department_name = #{oldDepartmentName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_department_approvers (department_name, approver_user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{departmentName}, #{approverUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
